title: Gemini 3.5 Flash joins the text endpoint
summary:
A solid day of model upgrades: Gemini 3.5 Flash hits the text endpoint, video generation gets more reliable, and a new app joins the greenhouse.

We've wired up Google's gemini-3.5-flash via Vertex AI. It brings fast, reasoning-capable completions to the text endpoint, complete with support for tool sanitization, code execution, and v3-flash thinking.

Seedream 5 and Seedance Pro have been migrated to Replicate. This means better stability and a standardized 720p output for your video generation calls. We also retired the legacy Seedance Lite model to keep the infrastructure clean.

Another community-built app, Duwit, has been added to the business showcase. Always good to see what people are building with the API.
